## Summary

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)

## Checklist
- [ ] `uv run pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff check src/ tests/` passes
- [ ] `uv run mypy --ignore-missing-imports src/elfmem/` passes
